nasb.text: “Declare and proclaim among the nations. Proclaim it and lift up a standard. Do not conceal it but say, ‘Babylon has been captured, Bel has been put to shame, Marduk has been shattered; Her images have been put to shame, her idols have been shattered.’

esv.text: “Declare among the nations and proclaim, set up a banner and proclaim, conceal it not, and say: ‘Babylon is taken, Bel is put to shame, Merodach is dismayed. Her images are put to shame, her idols are dismayed.’

cnv.text: “你們要在列國中傳揚和宣告， 要豎起旗幟宣揚， 不可隱瞞，說： ‘巴比倫被攻取了！ 彼勒蒙羞， 米羅達驚慌； 巴比倫的神像都蒙羞，它的偶像都驚慌。’

ccb.text: “你要向列国宣告， 你要竖起旗帜毫不隐瞒地宣告， ‘巴比伦要沦陷了！ 它的神明彼勒必蒙羞， 米罗达必惊慌； 巴比伦的神像都蒙羞， 偶像都必惊慌。
